### Checklist

### Notes

Dissonance — Documentation Repository

This repository stores all research, planning, and documentation for the Dissonance project.

Structure

- /research
  - /veille — ongoing tech watch notes
  - /benchmarks — benchmark results (C++ vs WASM vs TS/Python)
  - /interviews — expert interview notes
- /planning
  - milestones.md — project milestones and dates
  - roadmap.md — current roadmap and short-term plans
- /surveys
  - /raw — raw survey exports
  - /summaries — survey analyses and summaries
- /personas — user personas
- /design
  - /ui — UI mockups and flow
  - /core — core technical decision notes
- /assets — images, audio samples, slides
- /templates — meeting notes, report templates
- /.github — issue and PR templates for this repo

How to contribute

See CONTRIBUTING.md for contribution guidelines.
